steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what function the underlined sentence performs in the passage. The sentence states that the crater's shape and appearance "did not suggest" impact formation — it rules out one possible explanation for the crater.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "It introduces previous findings that suggested a research method for Cruikshank and his team.": The sentence does not introduce prior findings, nor does it describe a research method. It describes what the crater's appearance ruled out. ✗
  • "It implies that the research team eliminated an alternative explanation for the crater based on available evidence.": The sentence says the crater's appearance did not suggest impact formation — precisely eliminating impact as an alternative explanation for why the crater exists. ✓
  • "It emphasizes the importance of the New Horizons space probe to researchers.": The probe is mentioned in the first sentence; the underlined sentence is about the crater's appearance, not the probe's importance. ✗
  • "It identifies a misconception that the researchers had about the crater when they were first studying the data.": The passage never says the team initially believed the crater was formed by impact. There is no misconception being corrected here. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
